2262630.name: Wish Upon A Llama
2262630.description:
Wish Upon A Llama is a cozy, role-playing game for animal lovers! As Llama Town's rancher, rekindle a forgotten bond between townsfolk and animals, and dedicate your time to providing whole-hearted love and care for generations of animals.

  • Animals come in a variety of colors, patterns, and personalities. Baby animals inherit genetic traits from both parents, so you'll need to consider these factors as you breed them. Can you discover all 50+ special breeds?

  • Take your animals on walks anywhere you go to explore and enjoy the countryside together!

  • Cook hearty, gourmet meals for your animals!

  • Discover and befriend wild animals across diverse landscapes -- maze-like forests, tropical beaches, serene fields, and more!

  • Cultivate strong bonds with your companions through activities like gift-giving, playing fetch, bathing them, and enjoying mini-games like dancing together!

  • Help animals find their perfect home by connecting them with the right townsfolk -- you’ll still see them around town and can check in on how they’re doing!

Llama Town boasts a diverse population for you to meet! From the aspiring designer to the chill gamer, resilient immigrant, and determined engineer, encounter individuals with unique personalities and intriguing stories. Forge new friendships and perhaps discover romance. Challenge your friends to activities like jump rope, town cleaning, trivia games, spelling bees, and more -- there's never a dull moment in Llama Town!

Meet our dateable characters:

Other features 🥰

  • Start your own family and guide your children as they grow, attend school, and make friends, with the loving support of nearby grandparents.

  • By facilitating animal adoptions into perfect homes, you’ll help contribute to Llama Town’s fundraising efforts, unlocking exciting new infrastructure and breathtaking locations like vacation islands, lush forests, and picturesque beaches!

  • Unleash your creativity and personalize your dwelling and surrounding land. Fill them with decor to make your one-of-a-kind dream home
2262630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
